name: lark-subscribe-router-bridge
description: Bridges Lark/Feishu WebSocket events to d-pi source JSON-RPC 2.0 notifications. Uses the official @larksuiteoapi/node-sdk which selects the right WebSocket domain (lark-websocket vs feishu-websocket) based on the app's brand registration — sidestepping the lark-cli bus daemon's hardcoded-feishu-websocket bug.
